g.title: Layer 1
g.text: Netlify _redirects SPA · localStorage token · VITE_API_URL env
«provided interface» REST API — 112 endpoints · JSON responses
«provided interface» JPA Repository — JDBC/SSL → Neon · Cloudinary HTTP SDK → media upload/fetch
N+1 fix: enrichPage() batches GROUP BY · HikariCP max-pool=10 · open-in-view=false
«provided interface» @Transactional · Lombok · Jackson (non_null, ISO timestamps) · HikariCP · @PreAuthorize
Spring Security filter order: CorsFilter → JwtAuthFilter → AuthorizationFilter → Controller
